economic_claim_note: Per-share claims use fully diluted shares from valuation.inputs.
implied_growth_contract: Constant 7-year owner-cash growth with a 22x terminal owner-cash multiple; diagnostic, not forecast.
strongest_counter_explanation: growth projected without its capital cost
falsifiers: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
pricing_conclusion: Entry prices were computed mechanically from the routed power-zone profile (High-return compounder). They are decision inputs, not a decision; the owner must review the scenarios before acting.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of ABNB, including the core marketplace owner-cash engine, experiences/services option, net financial claims, and regulatory reserve.
economic_claim.unit_source: FY2025 weighted average diluted shares 623.0M (ABNB/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260212_rpt20251231_acc0001559720_26_000004.htm); FCF $4600.0M on 623.0M shares = $7.38/sh.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating marketplace cash is valued in core_marketplace_platform; net cash and debt are separate in net_financial_claims; experiences attach is non-overlapping milestone option; regulatory reserve is a negative claim. No component overlaps another.

economic_value_bridge.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K: revenue $12241.0M, FCF $4600.0M, cash $6864.0M, long-term debt $1995.0M, SBC $1.59B.

component_groups.label: Core marketplace owner-cash engine (nights and GBV)
component_groups.economic_claim: Core marketplace owner-cash engine (nights and GBV)
component_groups.adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key core_marketplace_platform; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Experiences and services attach option
component_groups.adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key experiences_services_option; seats in KPI embedded in core engine.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Low case $0/sh; base $4/sh; high $12/sh on incremental attach beyond nights path.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Milestone value over 3–7 years as experiences/services mix expands.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Marketing and product spend for attach largely in core owner-cash path; option net of embedded spend.

component_groups.label: Net cash and debt claims on common equity
component_groups.economic_claim: Net cash and debt claims on common equity
component_groups.adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key net_financial_claims; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Regulatory, tax, and execution reserve
component_groups.adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key regulatory_and_execution_reserve; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

limitations: Component ranges are filing-anchored bounded estimates, not committee-approved price targets.
Experiences/services option remains judgment-heavy pending standalone segment disclosure.
